name: Brain Teasers
description: Lateral-thinking riddles and logic puzzles for adults. Think before you answer!

stations.title: Riddle 1
stations.questionText: What has keys but opens no locks, has space but no room, and lets you enter but not go inside?

stations.title: Riddle 2
stations.questionText: The more of this there is, the less you see. What is it?

stations.title: Logic
stations.questionText: A farmer has 17 sheep, and all but 9 run away. How many are left?

stations.title: Word play
stations.questionText: What word becomes shorter when you add two letters to it?

stations.title: Riddle 3
stations.questionText: What can travel around the world while staying in one corner?

stations.title: Math trick
stations.questionText: A bat and ball cost 1.10 together. The bat costs 1.00 more than the ball. How much is the ball (in cents)?

stations.title: Riddle 4
stations.questionText: What has a head and a tail but no body?

stations.title: Sequence
stations.questionText: What comes next: O, T, T, F, F, S, S, ... ?

stations.title: Riddle 5
stations.questionText: What gets wetter the more it dries?

stations.title: Time logic
stations.questionText: If a clock shows 3:15, what is the angle between the hour and minute hands (approximately, in degrees)?
